concept.statement: Borealis Robotics' sensing kit correlates onboard accelerometer spikes with foil cavitation onset, giving early warning ahead of stability loss events.

evidence.quote: Across forty logged transits, accelerometer spikes above the calibrated threshold preceded a reported cavitation event in the large majority of cases, giving the bridge crew a median warning window of several seconds before the stability loss became noticeable.

Borealis Robotics' own engineering notes describe the correlation as strong enough to justify an audible cockpit alert, though the fixture operations team has so far only enabled a passive logging mode pending further validation on the wider fleet.

summary: Synthetic fixture concept: Borealis sensing kit correlates accelerometer spikes with foil cavitation onset.
